description.ko: 끊임없이 내리는 빗줄기 사이로 네온 불빛이 번쩍이는 거대한 미래 도시의 전경으로, 첨단 기술과 도시의 거친 질감이 공존하는 세계를 보여줍니다.
description.en: A sprawling futuristic cityscape where neon lights pierce through a perpetual downpour, revealing a world of advanced technology and urban grit.

prompt: cinematic wide shot of a cyberpunk city at night, futuristic metropolis, glowing neon signs in teal and magenta, heavy rain, reflections on wet asphalt, flying vehicles cruising between towering skyscrapers, crowded market stalls with holographic advertisements, volumetric fog, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic, intricate mechanical details, moody atmosphere.
